about.title: What Is A Build Guild?
about.intro: Build Guilds are local hardware meetups organized by students, where each city creates its own style of workshops, demos, and project time.
about.details: Our Tanta guild is a collaboration between Gharbiya STEM Hack Club and Gharbiya STEM Robo Club, designed to connect builders across the city and celebrate practical engineering.
organizerSteps: Start your guild and coordinate with fellow organizers.
Pick a date, venue, and format that fits your local community.
Plan activities, logistics, and safety details.
Gather attendees and run an unforgettable build day.

organizers.name: Gharbiya STEM Hack Club
organizers.description: The Hack Club chapter at Gharbiya STEM School co-leading the local guild experience.

organizers.name: Gharbiya STEM Robo Club
organizers.description: The robotics club at Gharbiya STEM School helping shape activities and logistics.
